2347820.name: Slender Myth Demo
2347820.description:
Explore the forest, piece together the past of this cursed place and put the myth to rest once and for all while evading the one who is always watching.

Collect pages, strange drawings left by those who were taken by him. Slender gets more violent as you collect more pages. The mentioned items have a direct impact on your sanity.

Find audio tapes and written instances of the events that happened in the past. These items are not necessary to find but assist you in figuring out the story behind this place.

Discover VHS tapes which tell visual stories of those who discovered the myth before you. Unlike audio tapes and written instances these tapes will be necessary to play. Each of these tapes contain an extra playable level whilst also helping to make the story clear.

(Slender is a character by Eric Knudsen) He has no face but he always watches, don't be fooled if you don't see him, he is always there. Slender's AI will be different than in other slender games though unfortunately due to the size of the map slender will use RNG though in none of these RNG scenarios will slender be able to instantly game end you without you messing up.
